zh.lifeSummary: 當Robert DeMorley於1293年出生在英國諾福爾可斯萬頓 摩利時，他的父親William DeMorley29歲，母親Cecily DeMohaut26歲。他於1316年10月20日之前與Hawise Marshall在英國英格蘭諾福爾可摩利 聖 彼得結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。他去世於1360年3月23日在法國哈帕格-亞登芒內布格享年67歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Robert DeMorley于1293年出生在英国諾福爾可斯萬頓 摩利时，他的父亲William DeMorley29岁，母亲Cecily DeMohaut26岁。他于1316年10月20日之前与Hawise Marshall在英国英格兰諾福爾可摩利 聖 彼得结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。他去世于1360年3月23日在法国哈帕格-亞登芒內布格享年67岁。

nameMeanings.name: Robert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the many French names of Germanic origin that were introduced into Britain by the Normans; it has since remained in continuous use. It is derived from the nearly synonymous elements hrōd ‘fame’ + berht ‘bright, famous’, and had a native Old English predecessor of similar form (Hreodbeorht), which was supplanted by the Norman name. Two dukes of Normandy in the 11th century bore the name: the father of William the Conqueror (sometimes identified with the legendary Robert the Devil), and his eldest son. It was borne also by three kings of Scotland, notably Robert the Bruce ( 1274–1329 ), who freed Scotland from English domination. The altered short form Bob is very common, but Hob and Dob, which were common in the Middle Ages and gave rise to surnames, are extinct. See also Rupert .

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Robert DeMorley was born in 1293, in Swanton Morley, Norfolk, England, his father, William DeMorley, was 29 and his mother, Cecily DeMohaut, was 26. He married Hawise Marshall before 20 October 1316, in Morley St Peter, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son. He died on 23 March 1360, in Bourgogne, Marne, Champagne-Ardenne, France, at the age of 67.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Robert DeMorley est né en 1293, à Swanton Morley, Norfolk, Angleterre, son père, William DeMorley, avait 29 ans et sa mère, Cecily DeMohaut, avait 26 ans. Il a épousé Hawise Marshall avant 20 octobre 1316, à Morley St Peter, Norfolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Il est décédé le 23 mars 1360, à Bourgogne, Marne, Champagne-Ardenne, France, à l’âge de 67 ans.

de.Morley, Norfolk, England: Morley St Peter, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Robert DeMorley 1293 in Swanton Morley, Norfolk, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater William DeMorley 29 und seine Mutter Cecily DeMohaut 26. Er hat vor 20. Oktober 1316 in Morley St Peter, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom Hawise Marshall geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Er starb am 23. März 1360 im Alter von 67 Jahren in Bourgogne, Marne, Champagne-Ardenne, Frankreich.

Lui sposato Hawise Marshall prima del 20 ottobre 1316, nel Morley St Peter, Norfolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. ko.Morley, Norfolk, England: 영국 잉글랜드 노르폴크 모를리 스트 피터
ko.lifeSummary: Robert DeMorley(이)가 1293년 영국 노르폴크 스완턴 모를리에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William DeMorley(은)는 29세였고, 그의 어머니 Cecily DeMohaut(은)는 26세였다. 그는 1316년 10월 20일 이전 영국 잉글랜드 노르폴크 모를리 스트 피터에서 Hawise Marshall(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1360년 3월 23일 프랑스 챔파그니-아르데니 마니 부르고그니에서 67세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.Morley, Norfolk, England: морли ст питир, норфолк, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Robert DeMorley родился в 1293 г. в местности свантон морли, норфолк, Англия, его отцу по имени William DeMorley было 29 лет, а матери, которую звали Cecily DeMohaut, 26. Он женился на женщине по имени Hawise Marshall перед 20 октябрь 1316 г. в местности морли ст питир, норфолк, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Он умер 23 марта 1360 г. в местности бургогн, марн, чампагне-арденн, Франция в возрасте 67 лет.
